title: hieracium pannosum subsp. pannosum
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. pannosum, also known as rough hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium pannosum subsp. pannosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
